response:
CANDIDATE_PARTIAL: Hatchery(nationalLobsterHatchery)
CANDIDATE_OVERWEAK: Exists(x) (LocatedIn(nationalLobsterHatchery, x))
CANDIDATE_OVERSTRONG: Hatchery(nationalLobsterHatchery) & LocatedIn(nationalLobsterHatchery, padstowEngland) & Exists(y) (Hatchery(y))
CANDIDATE_GIBBERISH: LocatedIn(padstowEngland, nationalLobsterHatchery)
